title: Faded Build: Redesign the Survey Intake Experience
summary: Faded Build: Redesign the Survey Intake Experience retrieves prior skills in an original partially specified community survey redesign sprint scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply design user goals, design information hierarchy, design spacing alignment, design color typography, design consistency feedback, design prototype test in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real partially specified community survey redesign sprint artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
